overall.description: A first-person perspective walkthrough of a cyberpunk city environment from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning with a view of a lower street from an elevated walkway, tilting up to reveal the narrow gap between towering skyscrapers, then proceeding along the walkway through a neon-lit market area adorned with traditional red paper lanterns. The scene blends futuristic holographic advertisements and metal structures with traditional Asian architectural elements.

events.description: camera tilts upward from street view to look at the sky between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: standing on elevated walkway looking down at holographic street barriers then tilting view upward

futuristic holographic barriers blocking off the lower street level

tall dark building with multiple levels and industrial details

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, enclosed cyberpunk alleyway viewed from an elevated walkway. The camera looks down at holographic barriers on the street below, surrounded by towering buildings with neon signage. Around 7 seconds, the camera tilts upward to reveal the narrow strip of sky visible between the skyscrapers above.

agents.ego_description: holding camera position to admire the towering architecture and sky bridges above

entered.detail: elevated walkway connecting the two opposing skyscrapers overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady upward gaze at the narrow vertical gap between massive skyscrapers, with bright natural light streaming down from above. Sky bridges span the gap between building facades, and neon signs glow on the right wall, emphasizing the immense scale of the cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with traditional lanterns

events.description: camera tilts down from sky view and begins walking forward along the walkway
camera turns right into a covered section adorned with red paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway and turning right to follow a pedestrian through a market area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking ahead of the camera through the lantern-lit corridor

entered.detail: traditional Asian paper lanterns with red glow hanging overhead
illuminated food stall with green neon lighting and display cases
view down to a lower level courtyard with buildings and greenery

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down and begins moving forward along the walkway, turning right into a semi-covered market area strung with glowing red paper lanterns. The player follows a pedestrian in a green jacket past food stalls, with the metal railing now on the left side overlooking a lower courtyard. The atmosphere shifts from stark vertical architecture to a more intimate, traditionally-decorated commercial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, vertical urban canyon into a vibrant, traditionally decorated market. It begins on an elevated walkway overlooking a dark alleyway filled with holographic barriers and neon signage, before tilting upward to reveal a narrow strip of bright sky trapped between towering skyscrapers. As the camera lingers on the immense scale of the architecture and the sky bridges spanning the gap, the perspective shifts downward to move forward along the path. The scene then opens into a semi-covered commercial area, turning right to follow a pedestrian past food stalls adorned with glowing red paper lanterns. This movement transforms the atmosphere from the stark, cold verticality of the city into an intimate space where futuristic metal railings overlook a lower courtyard.
